nodes.name: Crypto
nodes.notes: HMAC SHA256 for Zoom URL validation

nodes.name: Calculate Engagement Analytics1
nodes.notes: Core analytics engine: engagement graph, peaks, dropoffs, user time report

nodes.name: Wait 2 Seconds1
nodes.notes: Wait for Zoom to finalize meeting report data

nodes.name: Respond 200 OK1
nodes.notes: Acknowledge the Zoom event with 200 OK

nodes.name: Webhook Trigger1
nodes.notes: Listens for Zoom meeting.ended webhook events

nodes.name: Respond to Webhook (Events)1
nodes.notes: This node answers to the endpoint in case of regular Zoom events - such as ending meetings in this case.

nodes.name: Wait 1 second1
nodes.notes: This node waits 1 second to avoid calling the past webinar to early before it is available.

nodes.name: Wait 1 second
nodes.notes: This node waits 1 second to avoid calling the past webinar to early before it is available.

nodes.name: Respond to Webhook (Events)
nodes.notes: This node answers to the endpoint in case of regular Zoom events - such as ending meetings in this case.

parameters.output:
={{$item("0").$node["Webhook Trigger1"].json.body.event === "endpoint.url_validation" ? 0 : 

($item("0").$node["Webhook Trigger1"].json.body.event === "meeting.ended" || $item("0").$node["Webhook Trigger1"].json.body.event === "webinar.ended") ? 1 : 

($item("0").$node["Webhook Trigger1"].json.body.event === "meeting.participant_left" && $item("0").$node["Webhook Trigger1"].json.body.payload.object.participant.leave_reason != "left the meeting. Reason : Host ended the meeting.") ? 2 : 

($item("0").$node["Webhook Trigger1"].json.body.event === "webinar.participant_left" && $item("0").$node["Webhook Trigger1"].json.body.payload.object.participant.leave_reason != "left the meeting. Reason : Host ended the meeting.") ? 3 : 

($item("0").$node["Webhook Trigger1"].json.body.event === "recording.transcript_completed") ? 4 :
5}}

parameters.query:
UPDATE zoom_meeting_analytics
SET
  overall_ai_analysis  = {{ $json.overall_ai_analysis_json ? "$json_ai$" + $json.overall_ai_analysis_json + "$json_ai$::jsonb" : 'overall_ai_analysis' }},
  transcript_moments   = $json_tm${{ $json.transcript_moments_json }}$json_tm$::jsonb,
  transcript           = {{ $json.transcript_content ? "$tr$" + $json.transcript_content + "$tr$" : 'NULL' }},
  transcript_available = true,
  status               = 'COMPLETED'
WHERE client_name = '{{ $item("0").$node["server oauth"].json["db_name"] }}'
  AND meeting_id = '{{ $json.meeting_id }}';

nodes.name: Assemble Final Payload1
nodes.notes: Assemble complete payload ready for Postgres HTTP POST

nodes.name: Build AI Prompt1
nodes.notes: Construct OpenAI prompt from peaks/dropoffs + transcript

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO zoom_meeting_analytics (
  client_name,
  meeting_id,
  meeting_name,
  meeting_type,
  meeting_start_time,
  meeting_end_time,
  meeting_duration_minutes,
  interval_minutes,
  generated_at,
  data_source,

  total_unique_participants,
  total_participant_records,
  average_participation_minutes,
  max_participation_minutes,
  min_participation_minutes,

  engagement_score,
  average_retention,
  peak_concurrent_users,
  final_active_users,
  total_joined,
  total_left,

  engagement_graph,
  peaks,
  dropoffs,
  overall_ai_analysis,
  user_time_report,

  transcript_available,
  transcript_download_url,
  status,
  transcript
) VALUES (
  '{{ $item("0").$node["server oauth"].json["db_name"] }}',
  '{{ $json.meeting_id }}',
  '{{ $json.meeting_name }}',
  {{ $json.meeting_type }},
  {{ $json.meeting_start_time ? "'" + $json.meeting_start_time + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.meeting_end_time ? "'" + $json.meeting_end_time + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.meeting_duration_minutes }},
  {{ $json.interval_minutes }},
  '{{ $json.generated_at }}',
  '{{ $json.data_source }}',

  {{ $json.total_unique_participants }},
  {{ $json.total_participant_records }},
  {{ $json.average_participation_minutes }},
  {{ $json.max_participation_minutes }},
  {{ $json.min_participation_minutes }},

  {{ $json.engagement_score }},
  {{ $json.average_retention }},
  {{ $json.peak_concurrent_users }},
  {{ $json.final_active_users }},
  {{ $json.total_joined }},
  {{ $json.total_left }},

  $json_eg${{ $json.engagement_graph_json }}$json_eg$::jsonb,
  $json_pk${{ $json.peaks_json }}$json_pk$::jsonb,
  $json_do${{ $json.dropoffs_json }}$json_do$::jsonb,
  {{ $json.overall_ai_analysis_json ? "$json_ai$" + $json.overall_ai_analysis_json + "$json_ai$::jsonb" : 'NULL' }},
  $json_ut${{ $json.user_time_report_json }}$json_ut$::jsonb,

  {{ $json.transcript_available }},
  {{ $json.transcript_download_url ? "'" + $json.transcript_download_url + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  '{{ $json.status }}',
  {{ $json.transcript_content ? "$tr$" + $json.transcript_content + "$tr$" : 'NULL' }}
)
ON CONFLICT (client_name, meeting_id) DO UPDATE SET
  meeting_name              = EXCLUDED.meeting_name,
  meeting_type              = EXCLUDED.meeting_type,
  meeting_start_time        = EXCLUDED.meeting_start_time,
  meeting_end_time          = EXCLUDED.meeting_end_time,
  meeting_duration_minutes  = EXCLUDED.meeting_duration_minutes,
  interval_minutes          = EXCLUDED.interval_minutes,
  generated_at              = EXCLUDED.generated_at,
  data_source               = EXCLUDED.data_source,

  total_unique_participants = EXCLUDED.total_unique_participants,
  total_participant_records = EXCLUDED.total_participant_records,
  average_participation_minutes = EXCLUDED.average_participation_minutes,
  max_participation_minutes = EXCLUDED.max_participation_minutes,
  min_participation_minutes = EXCLUDED.min_participation_minutes,

  engagement_score          = EXCLUDED.engagement_score,
  average_retention         = EXCLUDED.average_retention,
  peak_concurrent_users     = EXCLUDED.peak_concurrent_users,
  final_active_users        = EXCLUDED.final_active_users,
  total_joined              = EXCLUDED.total_joined,
  total_left                = EXCLUDED.total_left,

  engagement_graph          = EXCLUDED.engagement_graph,
  peaks                     = EXCLUDED.peaks,
  dropoffs                  = EXCLUDED.dropoffs,
  overall_ai_analysis       = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.overall_ai_analysis, zoom_meeting_analytics.overall_ai_analysis),
  user_time_report          = EXCLUDED.user_time_report,

  transcript_available      = EXCLUDED.transcript_available,
  transcript_download_url   = EXCLUDED.transcript_download_url,
  status                    = EXCLUDED.status,
  transcript                = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.transcript, zoom_meeting_analytics.transcript);
